questions.question: Who is the author of ‘Footprints Without Feet’?
questions.answer: H.G. Wells is the author of ‘Footprints Without Feet’.

questions.question: Who is the main character of the story?
questions.answer: Griffin is the main character of the story.

questions.question: What special power does Griffin have?
questions.answer: Griffin has the power of invisibility.

questions.question: How did Griffin become invisible?
questions.answer: He became invisible by swallowing certain rare drugs.

questions.question: Why were footprints visible on the ground?
questions.answer: The footprints were visible because Griffin’s feet were muddy.

questions.question: Why did Griffin remove his clothes?
questions.answer: He removed his clothes to remain invisible.

questions.question: Why did Griffin enter a big store in London?
questions.answer: He entered the store to find warmth, food, and clothes.

questions.question: Where did Griffin go after leaving London?
questions.answer: Griffin went to the village of Iping.

questions.question: Who is Mrs Hall?
questions.answer: Mrs Hall is the wife of the innkeeper at Iping.

questions.question: Why did Mrs Hall think Griffin was eccentric?
questions.answer: She thought so because of his strange appearance and behaviour.

questions.question: What strange thing happened to the furniture?
questions.answer: The furniture appeared to move on its own.

questions.question: Why did villagers suspect Griffin of theft?
questions.answer: They suspected him because he suddenly had money.

questions.question: Who was Mr Jaffers?
questions.answer: Mr Jaffers was the village constable.

questions.question: What happened when Griffin removed his disguise?
questions.answer: People saw a headless man.

questions.question: What kind of person was Griffin?
questions.answer: Griffin was a lawless and selfish person.

questions.question: What genre does the story belong to?
questions.answer: The story belongs to the science fiction genre.

questions.question: Why was winter a problem for Griffin?
questions.answer: Winter was a problem because he could not wear clothes.

questions.question: What fear did Griffin create among villagers?
questions.answer: He created fear and panic among the villagers.

questions.question: What did Griffin misuse?
questions.answer: Griffin misused scientific knowledge.

questions.question: Why did Griffin want solitude?
questions.answer: He wanted solitude to hide his invisibility.

questions.question: What is the main theme of the story?
questions.answer: The main theme is the misuse of science.

questions.question: What value does the story promote?
questions.answer: The story promotes responsibility in the use of science.

questions.question: Why did Griffin escape from Iping?
questions.answer: He escaped because his invisibility was revealed.

questions.question: What does invisibility symbolise?
questions.answer: Invisibility symbolises power without responsibility.

questions.question: What lesson does the story teach?
questions.answer: The story teaches that knowledge must be used ethically.
